# Visual System

## Palette
- Background: #0D1117
- Primary accent: #F43F5E
- Text: #FFFFFF

## Typography
- Heading family: Inter
- Heading weight: ExtraBold
- Body family: Inter
- Body weight: Regular

## Layout
- Density: high
- Hero position: top-left

## Image treatment
photographic_grain

## UI chrome
- Pill tags: true
